top.name: Mirror Ward
top.rules_text: Prepare a glyph within 4. The next spell targeting a unit on this tile is reflected back at its caster.

bottom.name: Phase Shift
bottom.rules_text: Swap the positions of any 2 units within range 3. If either lands on a glyph, trigger it.

upgrades.description: The ward persists for two reflections. The shift reaches further.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4. The next 2 spells targeting a unit on this tile are reflected at their casters.
Swap any 2 units within range 5. If either lands on a glyph, trigger it.

upgrades.description: Mirror Field: covers the tile and its neighbors.

changes.value: Prepare reflecting glyphs on a 1-tile radius within 4. Each reflects the next 2 spells on units there.

upgrades.description: Chain Shift: swap 3 units in a chain.

changes.value: Cycle the positions of any 3 units within range 5. Glyph landings trigger.

upgrades.description: Hall of Reflection: reflected spells deal +50%.

changes.value: Prepare reflecting glyphs (radius 1) within 4. Reflected spells deal +50% and hit their casters.

upgrades.description: Banish Shift: also Names the swapped enemy.

changes.value: Swap 2 units within range 5; any enemy moved is Named for 1 turn. Glyph landings trigger.

upgrades.description: Aegis of Mirrors: a reusable reflecting fortress.

changes.value: Prepare reflecting glyphs (radius 1) for 3 turns. Every spell targeting units there is reflected for +50%.
Reposition every unit within range 5 as you choose. Enemies moved are Named 1 turn; glyph landings trigger.
